held_out_queries: How does PMLA's review work — how many reviewers, who decides, does the editor know my name?
Theories and Methodologies special feature — deadline? abstract? word limit?
Submission fee or OA/APC, and typical acceptance rate / time to decision?

edits.summary: Add the verified review process (>=2 reviewers; recommended articles to the Editorial Board, which meets with the editor for final decisions; Advisory Committee reports) and the editor-blind anonymity (author name not known to readers, board, OR editor until a final decision; recusal on conflicts); add the special-feature 15 October deadline + <=100-word proposal abstract + ~3,500-word contribution cap; make no-submission-fee / Cambridge-OA explicit and state that acceptance rate and time-to-decision are not fixed.
edits.gate_reason: strict improvement 65 -> 100; rates/timeline correctly deferred per source map
